01
The Philosophy

Books do not fail.
Visibility does.

Every author I work with has written something real. Something that carries weight. Something that a specific reader somewhere is actively searching for right now without knowing this book exists.

The gap between a deserving book and the readers who need it is almost never about quality. It is about placement, positioning, and the moment of connection that turns a browser into a believer.

I close that gap. Not through advertising budgets or algorithmic tricks but through genuine strategic work that puts the right book in front of the right reader at the right moment in her life.

I work with a carefully selected group of authors and creators at a time so every project receives the full attention and strategy it deserves. Not a template. A specific strategy built for one book, one brand, one goal.

I read books for the moment readers lean in or move on. Most books are missed not for quality, but for a small break in connection. That is what I notice and what I fix.

Book Growth Strategist
About Blessing

The person
behind the
strategy.

I am Blessing Dorcas, a Book Growth Strategist, Visibility Specialist, and Creative Designer working with authors, creators, and businesses who want their work to reach the people it was made for.

My work spans strategic marketing, reader psychology, digital content creation, brand design, website development, sales funnel architecture, and community placement. I do not run generic campaigns. I build specific solutions for specific goals.

Before I ever reach out to an author I study their book. I identify the ideal reader, map where she is gathering, and build four specific gifts for that book. All delivered before I ask for anything in return.

I believe the work that deserves to be found should be found. And I would rather prove that I understand a project before asking anyone to trust me with it.

🔗 LinkedIn ✉ Email Me
How It Works

Before I send
a single message

Nine steps of research completed before any outreach begins.

01
Identity Confirmed

Author confirmed across Amazon, Goodreads, Google, and all public platforms before anything begins.

02
Full Bibliography

Every book studied. Every description read. Every review count noted. Nothing assumed.

03
Deep Book Study

Emotional core identified. Ideal reader named. Why this book deserves wider visibility made completely clear.

04
Gifts Built and Delivered

Four premium gifts built specifically for this book and delivered before anything is asked in return.

Free Gifts For Every Author

Four gifts.
Before anything
is asked.

Every author I reach out to receives four premium documents built specifically for their book. Not templates. Specific work that could not have been built for any other book.

01
✦
Premium Quote Card

Built from the author's own confirmed real words and the exact colors of their actual cover. Created to stop a reader mid-scroll and make her feel the book before she has read a single page.

Delivered First
02
◈
Book Visibility Insight Card

Shows exactly where the book stands right now across every platform. Eight specific visibility metrics. Every gap named clearly so the author understands precisely what stands between her book and the readers who need it.

Delivered Second
03
◉
Reader Hook Insight

Maps three specific reader profiles. Names the emotional triggers that stop each reader mid-scroll. Identifies the exact communities where the ideal reader is already gathering every day. Not demographics. Psychology.

Delivered Second
04
◆
Market Research Analysis

Eight sections covering book overview, target audience, demographic and psychographic analysis, reading habits, competitive landscape, market trends, and a complete marketing strategy specific to one book and one reader community.

Delivered Third
Premium Quote Cards

Real work.
Real authors.

Every quote card is built from the author's own confirmed real words and the exact colors of their actual cover. No templates. No generic designs. Every card is as unique as the book it represents.

Signature Services

Beyond visibility.
Permanent growth.

Two high-value services that do not just bring readers to your book. They build the system that turns every reader who arrives into a consistent fan who never leaves.

Signature Service
◈
Reader Capture and
Funnel Design

Most books find readers once. A funnel makes sure they stay forever.

A complete website or landing page designed and built specifically for your book or author brand. Every element is built around one goal: capturing every reader who discovers your book and moving her from stranger to subscriber to loyal buyer.

  • Custom author or book landing page designed and built
  • Lead magnet strategy to convert browsers into subscribers
  • Email list capture integrated and fully operational
  • Reader journey mapped from first discovery to purchase
  • Mobile optimized and conversion tested before delivery
Signature Service
◆
Automation Workflow
for Consistent Readers

The system that works for your book while you focus on writing the next one.

The behind-the-scenes email and reader journey system that nurtures every new subscriber automatically. From the moment a reader discovers your book to the moment she pre-orders your next one, the system guides her every step of the way.

  • Welcome sequence written and fully automated
  • Reader nurture email series built and scheduled
  • Segmentation set up by reader interest and behavior
  • Re-engagement sequence for dormant subscribers
  • New release and launch sequence fully automated
All Services
Book Cover Design
A distinctive, genre-accurate cover designed to stop a reader mid-scroll and signal the world of the book instantly.
Book Mockup Design
Premium visual mockups showing your book in its best light across print, digital, and promotional formats.
Cinematic Book Trailer
A fully scripted and produced trailer that makes readers feel the story before they buy it.
Proofreading and Editing
Careful line-by-line proofreading and copy editing that ensures every page reflects the quality of the work behind it.
Sales Funnel and Website Design
Complete author or business websites and landing pages built with reader capture, automation, and conversion in mind.
Automation Workflow
Email and reader journey systems that nurture subscribers automatically from first discovery to consistent buyer.
Goodreads Strategy
Full profile setup, Listopia placement, and discussion group introductions that drive organic discovery.
Amazon A Plus Content
A complete enhanced brand content section that turns browsers into buyers at a meaningfully higher rate.
Digital Content Marketing
Quote cards, social content calendars, and visual assets that travel through reader communities organically.
Book Club Placement
Curated outreach to reading communities whose members become advocates, not just readers.
Podcast Promotion
Personalized pitches to aligned podcasts that reach the exact audience this book was written for.
Audiobook Promotion
Outreach to Audible communities and audiobook discovery platforms that print campaigns alone cannot reach.
Market Research Analysis
A thorough eight-section intelligence report covering your reader community, competitive landscape, and highest-return actions.
Bookmap Discovery Strategy
Placing your book inside the discovery maps that serious readers use to find their next meaningful read.
Investment Plans

Choose the plan
your book deserves.

Every plan begins with the same nine-step research protocol and the same commitment to understanding your book before anything else. Investment is discussed privately and tailored to your goals. Reach out and the conversation begins there.

Foundation
The Rosalind Plan

For the author ready to move from invisible to discoverable.

Four Weeks

Establish a full Goodreads presence, create shareable content, build an Amazon page that converts every arriving reader into a buyer, and launch your digital content strategy.

  • Goodreads author profile fully claimed and optimized
  • Listopia placement across top 12 reading lists
  • 5 active Goodreads discussion group introductions
  • 5 premium quote cards from confirmed real words
  • Amazon A Plus Content full build
  • Digital content marketing launch package
  • Book mockup design set
  • Reader audience targeting report
  • End of campaign visibility report
Start with this plan

Momentum
The Mission Plan

For the author ready to reach the communities this book was always meant to find.

Eight Weeks

A cinematic trailer. Comprehensive market research. Podcast campaign. Specialized community outreach and a full seven-platform social media strategy running simultaneously.

  • Everything in The Rosalind Plan
  • Cinematic book trailer fully scripted and produced
  • Comprehensive Market Research Analysis
  • Podcast pitch campaign to 20 researched podcasts
  • Audiobook promotion campaign
  • Specialized community and organization outreach
  • Full seven-platform social media strategy for 60 days
  • Bookmap discovery placement
  • Two monthly progress reports
Start with this plan
Legacy
The Legacy Plan

For a book that deserves to be read, discussed, and remembered for generations.

Twelve Weeks

Position your book permanently inside the communities it belongs to. Build the lasting reader community that keeps the book alive and selling for years.

  • Everything in The Mission Plan
  • Book club outreach to 20 curated clubs
  • Custom discussion guide for each club
  • Virtual author visit invitation per club
  • Academic and institutional community outreach
  • Reader capture funnel design and build
  • Automation workflow setup
  • Full social media management for 90 days
  • Weekly visibility reports throughout
  • End of campaign strategy session
Start with this plan
Entry Point
The First Step

Not every author is ready for a full campaign and that is completely understood. This option is for the author who wants to experience the work first and decide from there.

Five to Seven Days

A complete Goodreads setup built specifically for your book. The single highest-return action available for most authors right now. Permanent. Visible. Every result verifiable by you directly on your public Goodreads page.

  • Goodreads author profile fully claimed
  • Author biography written around your book
  • Author photo placed and optimized
  • Book submitted to top Listopia reading lists
  • Discussion group introductions for your genre
  • Full results visible on your public Goodreads profile
Start here

If you love what you see, we talk about the next step together.
